mapper.select:
SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE, T.STATUS, T.CREATE_DATE, T.MODIFY_DATE, T.COUNT, T.MEMBER_NO, T.SCHEDULE_NO, M.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE N WHERE N.POST_NO = T.TRAVEL_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TRAVEL_LIST T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE T.STATUS = 'Y' AND ( T.VISIBILITY = 'PUBLIC' OR (T.VISIBILITY = 'MEMBER' AND #{loginUserNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NOT NULL) )
AND T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND T.REGION = #{region}
ORDER BY
LIKE_COUNT DESC
T.COUNT DESC
T.CREATE_DATE DESC
OFFSET (#{pi.currentPage} - 1) * #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRAVEL_SUB_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_LIST_SUB (TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TRAVEL_NO, CONTENT_ID, RATING, LAT, LNG, CONTENT_TITLE) VALUES (#{travelSubNo}, #{travelSubContent}, #{travelSubSeq}, SYSDATE, #{travelNo}, #{contentId}, #{rating, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{contentTitle})
INSERT INTO TB_IMAGE (IMAGE_NO, IMAGE_PATH, FILE_NAME, RENAME_FILE, TRAVEL_SUB_NO) VALUES (SEQ_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{imagePath}, #{fileName}, #{renameFile}, #{travelSubNo})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{value} AND STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND STATUS='Y' ORDER BY TRAVEL_NO DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT T.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE N WHERE N.POST_NO = T.TRAVEL_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TRAVEL_LIST T WHERE T.TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo} AND T.STATUS = 'Y' AND ( T.VISIBILITY = 'PUBLIC' OR (T.VISIBILITY = 'MEMBER' AND #{loginUserNo} IS NOT NULL) )

SELECT TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TRAVEL_NO, CONTENT_ID, RATING, CONTENT_TITLE, LAT, LNG FROM TRAVEL_LIST_SUB WHERE TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo} ORDER BY TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NICE ( NICE_NO, POST_NO, MEMBER_NO, POST_BOARD_FX ) VALUES ( SEQ_NICE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{travelNo}, #{memberNo}, 'TR' )
mapper.select: SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE, T.STATUS, T.CREATE_DATE, T.MEMBER_NO, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TS.CONTENT_ID, TS.RATING, TS.CONTENT_TITLE FROM TRAVEL_LIST T LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB TS ON T.TRAVEL_NO = TS.TRAVEL_NO WHERE T.TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo} ORDER BY TS.TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ
